zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强但上行受阻
zh.content:
当前BTC短线呈震荡偏强结构，价格贴近65750高点后回落，但整体仍在均线上方运行。多空博弈加剧，短期波动明显。需谨慎追涨

MACD指标维持正值387附近，动能仍偏多但未出现明显扩散，短线有收敛迹象。SMA20在64990形成支撑。但上方阻力仍存

下方支撑关注65460与64990一带，上方阻力集中在65750及66000附近，区间震荡为主。突破前需放量确认信号较关键

建议短线以回调低吸为主，若站稳65750可轻仓顺势做多，跌破64990则需控制风险并观望。不宜追高等待确认信号为佳策略执行

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is currently trading around 65,550 after a very tight 24-hour range, indicating short-term consolidation following a mild pullback of 0.10%. Price action remains structurally neutral-to-slightly bullish as it holds above the 20-day SMA near 64,990. The market is compressing, suggesting a potential volatility expansion ahead. Buyers are still defending higher lows, but momentum lacks strong conviction, leading to sideways movement within a narrow equilibrium zone.

Momentum indicators present a mixed but cautiously constructive picture. MACD is positive at 387.89, suggesting underlying bullish momentum; however, absence of a visible signal line limits confirmation of crossover strength. RSI data is unavailable, reducing overbought/oversold clarity. The price holding above the SMA(20) reinforces short-term trend support. Overall, indicators suggest consolidation within an upward-biased structure rather than a strong directional breakout.

Immediate resistance is located near 65,750, aligning with the recent 24-hour high. A sustained break above this level could open the path toward 66,500 and then the psychological 67,000 zone. On the downside, initial support sits at 65,000, closely aligned with the SMA(20), followed by stronger support around 64,500. A break below this band would weaken bullish structure and potentially shift momentum back into a broader range-bound environment.

For trading approaches, range strategies remain favorable until a decisive breakout occurs. Traders may consider buying dips toward 65,000–64,800 with tight risk controls, targeting a rebound toward 65,750 and higher resistance zones. Breakout traders should wait for a confirmed daily close above 65,750 before entering long positions. Conversely, a drop below 64,500 would justify short-term bearish positioning with caution due to ongoing consolidation dynamics.
